click-guard fixture

Local fixture page for the security-review MUST-FIX #1/#2 click-target guard: proves a click on a javascript: anchor and a cross-origin anchor are BLOCKED by executor.js's click-target guard (never reach el.click()), while a same-origin anchor click still proceeds normally. Served over plain http (not file://) so the origin checks are real. Driven by tests/run_battery.py via extra battery.json entries.

  • danger link — javascript: scheme, must never execute page script via a model click.
  • offsite link — different port = different origin, must not be followed.
  • safe link — same-origin relative link, approving this click SHOULD navigate.

(the plain button has no href/formaction — no navigation target at all, click proceeds as an ordinary DOM click.)
